2603.27910.title: GAAMA: Graph Augmented Associative Memory for Agents
2603.27910.paper_summary: AI agents that interact with users across multiple sessions require persistent long-term memory to maintain coherent, personalized behavior. Current approaches either rely on flat retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), which loses structural relationships between memories, or use memory compression and vector retrieval that cannot capture the associative structure of multi-session conversations. There are few graph based techniques proposed in the literature, however they still suffer from hub dominated retrieval and poor hierarchical reasoning over evolving memory. We propose GAAMA, a graph-augmented associative memory system that constructs a concept-mediated hierarchical knowledge graph through a three-step pipeline: (1)~verbatim episode preservation from raw conversations, (2)~LLM-based extraction of atomic facts and topic-level concept nodes, and (3)~synthesis of higher-order reflections. The resulting graph uses four node types (episode, fact, reflection, concept) connected by five structural edge types, with concept nodes providing cross-cutting traversal paths that complement semantic similarity. Retrieval combines cosine-similarity-based $k$-nearest neighbor search with edge-type-aware Personalized PageRank (PPR) through an additive scoring function. On the LoCoMo-10 benchmark (1,540 questions across 10 multi-session conversations), GAAMA achieves 78.9\% mean reward, outperforming a tuned RAG baseline (75.0\%), HippoRAG (69.9\%), A-Mem (47.2\%), and Nemori (52.1\%). Ablation analysis shows that augmenting graph-traversal-based ranking (Personalized PageRank) with semantic search consistently improves over pure semantic search on graph nodes (+1.0 percentage point overall).
2603.27910.paper_summary_zh: AI 代理需要持久的長期記憶，以便在多個會話中與用戶互動時保持一致且個性化的行為。當前的方法要麼依賴於扁平的檢索增強生成 (RAG)，這會丟失記憶之間的結構關係，要麼使用記憶壓縮和向量檢索，這無法捕捉多會話對話的聯想結構。文獻中提出的基於圖形的技術不多，然而它們仍然面臨著以中心為主的檢索和對不斷演變的記憶進行層次推理的不足。我們提出 GAAMA，一個增強圖形的聯想記憶系統，通過三步驟的流程構建一個概念中介的層次知識圖： (1) 對原始對話進行逐字的事件保存， (2) 基於 LLM 的原子事實和主題級概念節點的提取，以及 (3) 高階反思的綜合。生成的圖使用四種類型的節點（事件、事實、反思、概念），由五種類型的結構邊連接，概念節點提供交叉的遍歷路徑，以補充語義相似性。檢索結合基於餘弦相似度的 $k$-最近鄰搜索與邊類型感知的個性化 PageRank (PPR)，通過加法計分函數進行。 在 LoCoMo-10 基準測試（涵蓋 10 個多會話對話的 1,540 個問題）中，GAAMA 實現了 78.9\% 的平均獎勵，超過了調整過的 RAG 基線（75.0\%）、HippoRAG（69.9\%）、A-Mem（47.2\%）和 Nemori（52.1\%）。消融分析顯示，將基於圖遍歷的排名（個性化 PageRank）與語義搜索相結合，始終在圖節點上超過純語義搜索 (+1.0 個百分點整體)。
2603.27910.author: Swarna Kamal Paul et.al.
2603.27910.authors: Swarna Kamal Paul, Shubhendu Sharma, Nitin Sareen
